name: Goldsmith Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Goldsmith Guild Master status or 20,000,000 ducats with Guild connections
calculationsAnalysis: The Goldsmith Guild Hall represents specialized institutional infrastructure for Venice's prestigious precious metals industry. The construction cost of 11,000,000 ducats reflects the secure architecture and specialized facilities required, while the income of 80,000 ducats (0.73% return) represents membership fees, hallmarking charges, and quality certification fees. The maintenance cost of 60,000 ducats (75% of income) creates a modest surplus appropriate for a non-profit institution. The employment capacity of 20 represents the administrative staff, assayers, and security personnel. The construction time of 15 days (1296000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in luxury goods governance with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the historical importance of quality assurance and fraud prevention in Venice's goldsmithing industry, which maintained the city's reputation for fine jewelry and precious metal work.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Goldsmith Guild governing precious metal crafting and jewelry standards.
fullDescription: Regulating Venice's prestigious precious metals industry, the Goldsmith Guild Hall ensures the quality and authenticity of gold and silver work throughout the city. Featuring metal testing laboratories, design archives, gem assessment facilities, security vaults, and demonstration spaces, this exclusive institution maintains strict standards on materials and craftsmanship. Its certification was required for all precious metal works, ensuring consistent quality in this high-value industry.
flavorText: Gold may seem unchangeable, but the craftsman's hand transforms it from mere wealth to immortal beauty—our guild ensures that when the Venetian mark is struck on gold, both the metal and the craftsmanship are beyond reproach.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Secure area, often near government district
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates luxury craft center, increases precious metal activity
